chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/427)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/427)
text: لَا اعْتِكَافَ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْجَامِعِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting in the general Masjid’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast and Jami‘ (central) Masjid Ttikaf is not valid.’”
